title: Nia Noir / NiaNoir.xo
about: Nia Noir or NiaNoir.xo, also known as NiaBasic , is an AI influencer and model generated as an exceptionally dark-skinned girl who contrasts her pitch-black skin with colorful outfits. The Nia Noir TikTok and Instagram accounts were launched in late December 2025, the former gaining over 3 million followers in just over a month. She garnered criticism as she went viral for being AI-generated and purportedly stealing content from TikToker @tatianakaer, essentially reskinning her dance videos with Nia.
origin:
On December 21st, 2025, the first video of Nia Noir was posted to the @nianoir.xo TikTok [1] account, garnering over 13.8 million views in just over a month. On December 24th, the first video went up on the niabasic Instagram [2] page.

Nia Noir's TikTok account went viral over the following weeks, garnering over 3 million followers by February 2026, though some suspect they are bots.

On December 28th, 2025, a dance video was uploaded to the TikTok [3] account that gained over 332 million views and 18 million likes in just over a month.

On December 31st, a video went up on the nianoir.xo TikTok [4] account that gained over 175 million views in a month.
